description: Runs a build/test command once and reports structured pass/fail with extracted error context. The council invokes this on a timer or on file-change events to monitor a workspace build.

inputs.name: command
inputs.description: argv array to execute, e.g. ["npm", "run", "build"]. shell=False — no string commands.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Working directory. Defaults to the current working directory.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.description: Hard cap on the build run.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True iff exit code is 0 and the run did not time out.

outputs.name: exitCode
outputs.description: Process exit code; null on spawn error or timeout.

outputs.name: durationMs
outputs.description: Wall-clock time of the build run.

outputs.name: firstErrorLine
outputs.description: First line that looks like an error in stdout/stderr, for fast triage.

outputs.name: tail
outputs.description: Last ~2KB of combined stdout+stderr — feed to task-terminal-error-resolver for classification.

outputs.name: suggestedNextSkill
outputs.description: task-terminal-error-resolver when there's a failure with recognizable terminal output.
